Source   Edit  

Fastx writer utilities for buffered FASTA/FASTQ output.

This module provides an efficient FastxWriter abstraction that supports:

  • FASTA or FASTQ formatting
  • Plain-text or gzip-compressed output
  • File or stdout destination
  • Buffered chunked writes for throughput

Typical usage:

import readfx/writer
import readfx/seqtypes

var w = fastxWriter(
  format = fxfFastq,
  compression = true,
  destination = fileDestination("out.fastq.gz"),
  bufferSize = 4 * 1024 * 1024,
  compressionLevel = 6
)
defer: w.close()

w.writeRecord(FQRecord(name: "r1", sequence: "ACGT", quality: "IIII"))

Imports

seqtypes

Types

FastxDestination = object
  case kind*: FastxDestinationKind
  of fxdStdout:
      nil

  of fxdFile:
      path*: string
Source   Edit   
FastxDestinationKind = enum
  fxdStdout,                ## Write to stdout
  fxdFile                    ## Write to file path
Source   Edit   
FastxFormat = enum
  fxfFasta,                 ## Emit FASTA records
  fxfFastq                   ## Emit FASTQ records
Source   Edit   
FastxWriter = object
  format*: FastxFormat
  compression*: bool
  destination*: FastxDestination
  bufferSize*: int
  compressionLevel*: int
  compressionThreads*: int
  fastaWidth*: int
  isOpen*: bool
Source   Edit  

Consts

DefaultBufferSize = 4194304
Source   Edit   
DefaultCompressionLevel = 6
Source   Edit   
DefaultFastaWidth = 60
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc close(w: var FastxWriter) {....raises: [IOError, OSError, ValueError],
                                 tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}

Flush and close the writer stream.

It is safe to call close multiple times.

Source   Edit   
proc fastxWriter(format: FastxFormat; compression: bool = false;
                 destination: FastxDestination = stdoutDestination();
                 bufferSize: int = DefaultBufferSize;
                 compressionLevel: int = DefaultCompressionLevel;
                 compressionThreads: int = 1;
                 fastaWidth: int = DefaultFastaWidth): FastxWriter {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, OSError, IOError], tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadEnvEffect,
    ReadIOEffect, ExecIOEffect, RootEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}

Create and open a configured FASTA/FASTQ writer.

Args: format: Output format (fxfFasta or fxfFastq) compression: Enable gzip compression for output stream destination: Output destination (stdout or file) bufferSize: Application-level output buffer size in bytes compressionLevel: zlib compression level (0..9) compressionThreads: Requested compression threads. If > 1, the writer attempts to use pigz for file destinations and gracefully falls back to built-in zlib compression when pigz is not available or cannot be started. fastaWidth: FASTA sequence line width (used only in FASTA mode)

Returns: Initialized FastxWriter

Raises: IOError: If destination stream cannot be opened ValueError: If configuration values are invalid

Source   Edit   
proc fileDestination(path: string): FastxDestination {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}

Create a file destination descriptor.

Args: path: Output file path

Returns: FastxDestination(kind: fxdFile, path: path)

Source   Edit   
proc flush(w: var FastxWriter) {....raises: [IOError, OSError],
                                 tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}

Flush pending buffered bytes to the destination stream.

Notes: This writes the current application buffer. For gzip streams, final trailer bytes are emitted during close.

Source   Edit   
proc stdoutDestination(): FastxDestination {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Create a stdout destination descriptor.

Returns: FastxDestination(kind: fxdStdout)

Source   Edit   
proc writeRecord(w: var FastxWriter; name: string; sequence: string;
                 quality: string = ""; comment: string = "") {.
    ...raises: [IOError, ValueError, OSError], tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}

Convenience overload to write from scalar fields.

Args: w: Writer instance name: Record identifier sequence: Sequence string quality: FASTQ quality string (required for FASTQ mode) comment: Optional header comment

Source   Edit   
proc writeRecord(w: var FastxWriter; record: FQRecord) {.
    ...raises: [IOError, ValueError, OSError], tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}

Append one record to the writer.

Args: w: Writer instance record: Record to write

Raises: IOError: If the writer is closed or I/O fails ValueError: If record validation fails for selected format

Source   Edit
